description: This video explains the concept of smart contracts, their history, and their significance in decentralized finance (DeFi).
topic_summary: Smart contracts are self-executing programs on the blockchain that automate contractual agreements when conditions are met. Initially proposed by Nick Szabo in the 1990s, they gained traction with the launch of Ethereum in 2015, enabling various applications in finance and content management. [t=3:20] [t=43:65]
